origin.capability_match: Receive $BERA token allocation subject to vesting

attack_surface.data_description: Interaction with the claim function of the (implicit) vesting mechanism, potentially exploiting logic flaws.

security_gap.gap_description: A flaw in the vesting contract's claim logic might allow an investor or an attacker impersonating one to claim more $BERA tokens than they are legitimately entitled to.

actor_risk.description: The Investor (Actor ID 11), or an attacker, illegitimately acquires more $BERA tokens than allocated through vesting by exploiting the claim mechanism.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Direct theft of funds from the vesting pool/treasury due to flawed claim logic.

assumptions: The vesting mechanism has logic to determine how many tokens an investor can claim.
This logic might contain exploitable flaws (e.g., reentrancy, integer overflows/underflows, incorrect state updates, rounding errors).

mitigation.strategy: Rigorous security audits of the vesting smart contract. Adherence to secure development practices (e.g., checks-effects-interactions pattern). Formal verification if feasible. Comprehensive testing of edge cases in claim logic.

description: An Investor (Actor ID 11) or an attacker exploits a flaw in the (implicit) vesting mechanism to claim more $BERA tokens than they are entitled to, effectively elevating their privilege over the token distribution.

trace_source.matched_capability: Receive $BERA token allocation subject to vesting
